name: cair
description: Community marketplace for Claude Code skills and agentic workflows, curated by CAIR (Center for Artificial Intelligence Research).

plugins.name: caveman
plugins.description: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts token usage ~75% by dropping filler, articles, and pleasantries while keeping full technical accuracy.

plugins.name: deep-research
plugins.description: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report.
